role: Deputy Head of Iran's Military Intelligence Directorate
bio: Gholamreza Mehrabi served as the Deputy Head of Iran's military intelligence directorate under the [General Staff of the Armed Forces](/orgs/general-staff-of-the-armed-forces). He was killed on 14 June 2025 in the early phase of the [Israeli strikes on Iran](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-june-2025) that initiated the Twelve-Day War.
editorial_notes: Deputy Head of military intelligence directorate. Killed 14 June 2025 in opening strikes of Twelve-Day War.
